(DEVICE FILE: RTL8723BU_1_NL-H873-USA1_NL-H87)

PACKAGE 'NL-H873-USA1'
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 9

PINORDER 'RTL8723BU_1_NL-H873-USA1_NL-H87' 3V3 'D+' 'D-' EN GND GND0 GND1 RF0 RF1
FUNCTION G1 'RTL8723BU_1_NL-H873-USA1_NL-H87' 11 13 12 16 14 1 4 2 3

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME RTL8723BU_1
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'NL-H873-USA1'

END
